entries.claim_text: LLaVA-Med: Training a Large Language-and-Vision Assistant for Biomedicine in One Day
entries.quoted_snippet: Training a Large Language-and-Vision Assistant for Biomedicine in One Day

entries.claim_text: NeurIPS 2023
entries.quoted_snippet: Neural Information Processing Systems 2023, NeurIPS 2023

entries.claim_text: Chunyuan Li, Cliff Wong, Sheng Zhang, Naoto Usuyama, Haotian Liu, Jianwei Yang, Tristan Naumann, Hoifung Poon, Jianfeng Gao
entries.quoted_snippet: Naoto Usuyama, Haotian Liu, Jianwei Yang

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/microsoft/LLaVA-Med
entries.quoted_snippet: https://aka.ms/llava-med

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: inproceedings

entries.claim_text: LLaVA-Med 兩階段課程學習訓練流程示意
entries.quoted_snippet: continuously trained in a curriculum learning fashion

entries.claim_text: 面對生物醫學影像時往往表現得像門外漢
entries.quoted_snippet: general-domain visual assistants may behave like a layperson

entries.claim_text: 用 language-only GPT-4 只根據文字
entries.quoted_snippet: uses GPT-4 to generate diverse biomedical multimodal instruction-following data

entries.claim_text: 以 30 詞為分界
entries.quoted_snippet: We sample 600K image-text pairs from PMC-15M

entries.claim_text: 這五種最常見模態取樣 60K 組
entries.quoted_snippet: we sample 60K image-text pairs from the five most common imaging modalities

entries.claim_text: 每一筆對齊樣本被組織成單輪的指令跟隨格式
entries.quoted_snippet: we create a single-round instruction-following example

entries.claim_text: Assistant : X_c
entries.quoted_snippet: single-round instruction-following example

entries.claim_text: 同時凍結視覺編碼器與語言模型，只更新投影矩陣
entries.quoted_snippet: only update the projection matrix

entries.claim_text: Stage 1 與 Stage 2 分別約 7 與 8 小時、合計不到 15 小時
entries.quoted_snippet: it takes 7 and 8 hours for stage 1 and 2 on 8 40G A100 GPUs

entries.claim_text: 作者構建 193 題全新問題
entries.quoted_snippet: we construct an evaluation dataset with 193 novel questions

entries.claim_text: 只做 Stage 1 反而掉到 23.3
entries.quoted_snippet: with Stage-1 training alone is insufficient as a chatbot

entries.claim_text: 封閉式問題報 accuracy、開放式問題報 recall
entries.quoted_snippet: For the closed-set questions, we report the accuracy

entries.claim_text: 刷新了 supervised SoTA
entries.quoted_snippet: is higher than supervised SoTA on the closed-set questions on VQA-RAD and PathVQA

entries.claim_text: LLaVA-Med 只在 SLAKE 上取得 SoTA
entries.quoted_snippet: achieves SoTA on SLAKE, while its performance is limited on other datasets

entries.claim_text: 這在臨床脈絡下不只是品質瑕疵，而是安全風險
entries.quoted_snippet: limited by hallucinations and weak in-depth reasoning

entries.claim_text: 存在循環評估（circular evaluation）的偏誤風險
entries.quoted_snippet: We leverage GPT-4 to quantify the correctness of the model answer

entries.claim_text: 真正的新意集中在「圖說→指令」的資料生成配方與兩階段課程
entries.quoted_snippet: initialize the language model from Vicuna

entries.claim_text: 更貼近真實臨床提問的開放式問題，LLaVA-Med 反而多半落後既有方法
entries.quoted_snippet: its performance is limited on other datasets, especially compared with existing methods
